invariants.text: forall j: int {:trigger rolls[j]} {:trigger x[j]} | 0 <= j < i :: IsCorrectAnswer(x[j], rolls[j])

ensures.text: forall i: int {:trigger rolls[i]} {:trigger x[i]} | 0 <= i < |rolls| :: IsCorrectAnswer(x[i], rolls[i])
forall i: int {:trigger rolls[i]} {:trigger x[i]} | 0 <= i < |rolls| :: IsCorrectAnswer(x[i], rolls[i])

requires.text: forall i: int {:trigger x[i]} | 0 <= i < |x| :: x[i] >= 2
forall i: int {:trigger x[i]} | 0 <= i < |x| :: x[i] >= 2
